description_long: This is a compact, rectangular refrigerator with a smooth, light gray exterior and a single front door. The door opens from the right, revealing two interior shelves and additional storage space on the door itself. The interior is white, and there is a small green bottle placed on the lower shelf of the door, indicating the scale and storage function. The refrigerator has a flat top surface, suitable for placing small items, and the door is slightly curved at the edges for a modern look. There are no visible brand logos, control panels, or external vents on the exterior. The overall design is minimalistic, with an integrated handle groove at the top of the door for easy opening.
description: A compact, light gray refrigerator with a single right-hinged door, smooth exterior, and minimalistic design. The interior features two shelves and door storage, with a flat top surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the closed, smooth door and the flat top surface.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the refrigerator's depth and the slight protrusion of the door.
description_view_2: Front angled view with the door open, revealing two interior shelves and a green bottle in the door storage.
description_view_3: Side angled view with the door open, showing the interior shelving and door storage from a different perspective.
attribute_door_handle_style: Integrated groove at the top edge of the door, recessed and flush with the surface.
